name: Stafford Town
description:
Located between junctions 13 and 14 of the M6 motorway, the thriving county town is home to a wide range of national high street retailers. Located in the centre is the High House, a historical building of much local interest.

Supporting the local communities, Stafford provides a wide range of facilities including Victoria Park, a bowling green, cinema, library and leisure centre, a number of churches and a mainline railway station.
